title: Headlight Ballast 22794558 Xenon HID Control Module D3S D3R D1SR Ford Focus Mk3 Hyundai i40 Rover Freelander 2 Evoque Sonata Santa Fe Jaguar XF XFR 35W Ballast Driver Unit
features: 1.Compatibility: Fits Ford Focus Mk3 (Hatch & Estate) 07/2010–02/2020; Hyundai i40 Estate 07/2011–05/2019; Land Rover Freelander 2 (L359) 10/2006–10/2014. Also compatible with Range Rover Evoque, Hyundai Sonata, Santa Fe and Jaguar XF/XFR — ideal 35W xenon D3S/D3R headlamp ballast.

2.OEM / Cross‑reference: GM 22794558 (10R‑044663), Ford 1710026 / 7L7Z13C170A, Hyundai 92190‑3Z200 / 92190‑B1100; also referenced as A71177E00DG and A71154400DG. Check your OEM/part number to ensure correct 35W ballast/control unit fit.
3. Attention during verification: Ensure that you check the model, year of manufacture, and OEM number of your vehicle to guarantee a perfect fit and optimal function.
4. 3 Months Warranty: Buy with confidence! We offer a 3-month warranty for this accessory. If there are any defects, repairs or replacements will be provided.

5. Fast customer support: Do you have questions? Contact us within 12 hours and we will respond to your email! Technical support is available for all clarifications regarding installation and compatibility.
description: Product Description Product information: Condition: Brand new Colour: Silver Voltage: 12V Drive type: Electric Housing material: Iron OEM numbers: FORD — 1710026 FORD — 7L7Z 13C17 0A GENERAL MOTORS — 22 794 558 HYUNDAI — 92190-3Z200 HYUNDAI — 92190-B1100 Compatible vehicles: FORD FORD Focus Mk3 Hatchback (DYB) (Year of 07.2010 - 02.2020) FORD Focus Mk3 Estate (DYB) (Year of 07.2010 - 02.2020) HYUNDAI HYUNDAI i40 Estate (VF) (Year of 07.2011 - 05.2019) LAND ROVER LAND ROVER Freelander 2 SUV (L359) (Year of 10.2006 - 10.2014) 3+3pins Identical to your previous product – you can use it effortlessly without any additional learning effort. Designed for Ford Focus Mk3 Hatchback and Estate (2010-2020), Hyundai i40 Estate (2011-2019), Land Rover Freelander 2 SUV (2006-2014), and other select models. Please confirm fitment with your vehicle. OEM Replacement: Direct replacement for part numbers 22794558, 1710026, 7L7Z 13C170A, 92190-3Z200, 92190-B1100, A71177E00DG, A71154400DG, and others. Manufactured to match or exceed original specifications. Advanced Protection: Features multiple safety protections including short-circuit, over-voltage, and over-temperature safeguards to ensure stable and reliable headlight performance. High Performance: 35W output ensures optimal brightness and efficiency for LED and Xenon headlamp systems. Restores proper lighting function and fixes common headlight flickering or failure issues.
